content.content:
1→# LLM Proxy Intelligence — Implementation Roadmap
     2→#
     3→# Builds on existing walking skeleton (anthropic-proxy-route.ts) which provides
     4→# basic SSE passthrough with metadata parsing. This roadmap adds: full identity
     5→# resolution, trace capture, cost attribution, policy enforcement, spend/audit
     6→# APIs, context injection, conversation correlation, and Observer intelligence.
     7→#
     8→# Design artifacts:
     9→#   - docs/architecture/llm-proxy-architecture.md (base proxy)
    10→#   - docs/architecture/llm-proxy-intelligence-design.md (intelligence capabilities)
    11→#   - docs/feature/llm-proxy/design/ (architecture, components, data models, tech stack)
    12→#   - docs/feature/llm-proxy/distill/ (82 acceptance scenarios across 13 milestones)
    13→#   - docs/adrs/ADR-050 (conversation hash UUIDv5)
    14→#   - docs/adrs/ADR-051 (Observer-owned detection, no proxy response analyzer)
    15→#
    16→# Paradigm: Functional (TypeScript)
    17→# Rigor: inherit model, review enabled, mutation disabled
    18→
    19→project_id: llm-proxy
    20→title: "LLM Proxy — Transparent Passthrough with Intelligence Layer"
    21→paradigm: functional
    22→
    23→validation:
    24→  status: approved
    25→  reviewed_at: "2026-03-16"
    26→  reviewer: nw-software-crafter-reviewer
    27→  iteration: 2
    28→  verdict: APPROVED
    29→  revision_summary: >
    30→    Revision 2: Addressed all 6 blocking + 5 high issues from iteration 1 crafter review.
    31→    D2: Fixed CREATE idempotency semantics (catch error, not no-op).
    32→    D3: Added webhook error handling contract for Observer EVENT reliability.
    33→    D4: Specified trace output FLEXIBLE field JSON shape.
    34→    D5: Added route registration verification AC for spend/audit endpoints.
    35→    D6: Made Observer prerequisites explicit (file paths, patterns to verify).
    36→    H1: Added parametrized test requirement to pre-implementation gate.
    37→    H2: Specified exact budget enforcement SurrealDB query.
    38→    H3: Added KNN two-step workaround pattern to Observer AC.
    39→    H4: Specified proxy pipeline hook execution order.
    40→    H5: Specified exact SurrealDB queries for context candidate pool.
    41→
    42→phases:
    43→  - id: "01"
    44→    title: "Foundation — Schema, Passthrough, Identity, Trace, Cost"
    45→    description: >
    46→      Extend the walking skeleton into a production proxy: schema migrations for
    47→      llm_call trace type, identity resolution from Claude Code metadata + headers,
    48→      async trace capture with graph edges, and cost computation from pricing tables.
    49→    steps:
    50→      - step_id: "01-01"
    51→        title: "Schema migrations for LLM proxy"
    52→        description: >
    53→          Three migrations extending the schema for LLM proxy capabilities:
    54→          (1) Add 'llm_call' to trace type ASSERT, add LLM-specific optional fields
    55→          (model, provider, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens,
    56→          cache_read_tokens, cost_usd, stop_reason, request_id).
    57→          (2) Rename opencode_session_id to external_session_id on agent_session
    58→          with composite index for session lookup.
    59→          (3) Create proxy_intelligence_config SCHEMAFULL table with workspace-scoped
    60→          settings for context injection and contradiction detection.
    61→          Update surreal-schema.surql with all new definitions.
    62→        acceptance_criteria:
    63→          - "trace type ASSERT includes 'llm_call' alongside existing types"
    64→          - "LLM fields (model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cost_usd, provider, stop_reason, request_id) defined as option<> on trace"
    65→          - "agent_session.external_session_id replaces opencode_session_id via 3-step data migration: (1) DEFINE FIELD external_session_id, (2) UPDATE agent_session SET external_session_id = opencode_session_id WHERE opencode_session_id IS NOT NONE, (3) REMOVE FIELD opencode_session_id; composite index on (external_session_id, workspace) created after data copy"
    66→          - "proxy_intelligence_config table created in migration 0042 — SCHEMAFULL with workspace, context_injection_enabled, context_injection_token_budget, context_injection_cache_ttl_seconds, context_injection_tier, contradiction_detection_enabled, contradiction_tier1_threshold, contradiction_tier2_confidence_min fields"
    67→          - "surreal-schema.surql updated with all new definitions (reflects state after all three migrations applied)"
    68→          - "bun migrate applies all three migrations successfully"
    69→          - "Schema migrations are breaking (per project policy) — no rollback supported; ensure implementation readiness before applying"
    70→        files_to_modify:
    71→          - "schema/migrations/0040_trace_llm_call_fields.surql"
    72→          - "schema/migrations/0041_proxy_session_id.surql"
    73→          - "schema/migrations/0042_proxy_intelligence_config.surql"
    74→          - "schema/surreal-schema.surql"
    75→        depends_on: []
    76→
    77→      - step_id: "01-02"
    78→        title: "Proxy handler refactor with identity + session resolution"
    79→        description: >
    80→          Refactor the walking skeleton anthropic-proxy-route to accept
    81→          ServerDependencies (surreal, inflight tracker, config). Extract identity
    82→          resolution into a pure function that parses metadata.user_id (Claude Code
    83→          format) + X-Brain-Workspace + X-Brain-Task + X-Brain-Agent-Type headers.
    84→          Extract session ID resolution into a pure function that reads session ID
    85→          from metadata.user_id (session_{uuid} pattern) or X-Brain-Session header.
    86→          Add workspace validation (verify workspace exists in DB, cached). Ensure
    87→          full header forwarding (anthropic-version, anthropic-beta, x-api-key,
    88→          authorization, content-type). Upstream failure returns 502 with
    89→          source:proxy distinction. Malformed request body forwarded as-is.
    90→        acceptance_criteria:
    91→          - "Proxy handler receives ServerDependencies for SurrealDB and inflight access"
    92→          - "Identity resolved from metadata.user_id + X-Brain-Workspace + X-Brain-Task + X-Brain-Agent-Type"
    93→          - "Session ID extracted from metadata.user_id session_{uuid} pattern OR X-Brain-Session header"
    94→          - "Missing identity signals degrade gracefully (workspace-only or no attribution)"
    95→          - "Invalid workspace logged as warning but does not block request forwarding"
    96→          - "Upstream failure returns 502 with {error: 'upstream_unreachable', source: 'proxy'}"
    97→          - "Malformed/non-JSON request body forwarded without proxy validation errors"
    98→          - "All required headers forwarded: anthropic-version, anthropic-beta, x-api-key, authorization, content-type"
    99→          - "count_tokens requests forwarded without triggering trace capture"
   100→          - "Proxy pipeline execution order: (1) identity resolution, (2) session ID resolution, (3) conversation hash [03-01], (4) policy evaluation [02-01], (5) context injection [03-02], (6) request forwarding, (7) async trace capture [01-03]"
   101→        files_to_modify:
   102→          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
   103→          - "app/src/server/proxy/identity-resolver.ts"
   104→          - "app/src/server/proxy/session-id-resolver.ts"
   105→          - "app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts"
   106→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-passthrough.test.ts"
   107→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-identity.test.ts"
   108→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-session-resolution.test.ts"
   109→        depends_on:
   110→          - "01-01"
   111→
   112→      - step_id: "01-03"
   113→        title: "Async trace capture with cost computation"
   114→        description: >
   115→          Trace writer module that creates llm_call trace nodes in SurrealDB after
   116→          stream/response completion. Async via deps.inflight.track(). Creates
   117→          RELATE edges: session->invoked->trace, trace->scoped_to->workspace,
   118→          trace->attributed_to->task (when task resolved). Cost calculator computes
   119→          per-call cost from a static pricing table (TypeScript config object) using
   120→          model-specific rates for input, output, cache_creation, and cache_read
   121→          tokens. SSE usage extraction extended to capture cache_creation_tokens and
   122→          cache_read_tokens from message_start events. Non-streaming usage extracted
   123→          from response body. Graph write failure retried 3x with exponential
   124→          backoff, fallback to structured log output.
   125→        acceptance_criteria:
   126→          - "llm_call trace node created for every forwarded LLM call with model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cost_usd, latency_ms, stop_reason"
   127→          - "RELATE edges created: session->invoked->trace (when session resolved), trace->scoped_to->workspace (always), trace->attributed_to->task (when task resolved)"
   128→          - "Cost computed from model-specific pricing: (uncached_input * input_rate + cache_read * cache_rate + output * output_rate) / 1_000_000"
   129→          - "Trace capture does not block response delivery — all work via deps.inflight.track()"
   130→          - "Graph write failure retried 3x with exponential backoff, then logged as structured output"
   131→          - "Non-streaming responses extract usage from JSON response body"
   132→          - "Cache tokens (cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens) captured from SSE message_start event"
   133→          - "count_tokens requests do NOT create traces"
   134→        files_to_modify:
   135→          - "app/src/server/proxy/trace-writer.ts"
   136→          - "app/src/server/proxy/cost-calculator.ts"
   137→          - "app/src/server/proxy/pricing-table.ts"
   138→          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
   139→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-trace.test.ts"
   140→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-cost.test.ts"
   141→        depends_on:
   142→          - "01-01"
   143→          - "01-02"
   144→
   145→  - id: "02"
   146→    title: "Value — Policy Enforcement, Spend API, Audit"
   147→    description: >
   148→      Pre-request policy enforcement (model access, budget, rate limiting),
   149→      spend monitoring API endpoints for dashboard consumption, and audit
   150→      provenance chain with compliance verification.
   151→    steps:
   152→      - step_id: "02-01"
   153→        title: "Policy enforcement at proxy boundary"
   154→        description: >
   155→          Pre-request policy evaluation using the existing evaluatePolicyGate()
   156→          pipeline with llm_call context. Model access checks use policy rules
   157→          matching agent_type to allowed_models. Budget enforcement reads today's
   158→          spend from trace aggregation, compares against workspace daily_budget.
   159→          Rate limiting uses in-memory sliding window counter per workspace
   160→          (too frequent for DB queries). Policy violation responses include
   161→          policy reference and remediation guidance. No policies configured
   162→          defaults to permissive with warning observation. Policy decisions
   163→          logged for audit trail.
   164→        acceptance_criteria:
   165→          - "Model access violation returns 403 with JSON body: {error, policy_ref, policy_description, model_suggestion, remediation}"
   166→          - "Budget exceeded returns 429 with JSON body: {error, current_spend_usd, daily_limit_usd, time_until_reset_seconds}; spend computed via SELECT math::sum(cost_usd) FROM trace WHERE ->scoped_to->workspace = $ws AND created_at >= time::floor(time::now(), 1d)"
   167→          - "Rate limit exceeded returns 429 with Retry-After header + JSON body: {error, rate_limit_per_minute, reset_time_unix}"
   168→          - "Budget enforcement reads today's spend from cached spend aggregation (updated on every trace write, TTL 10s fallback); cache miss triggers live trace aggregation query"
   169→          - "Policy check completes under 10ms at p99 (in-memory rate limit + cached spend)"
   170→          - "No policies configured defaults to permissive — request forwarded with warning observation"
   171→          - "Policy decision (pass/fail, policy_ref, timestamp) logged on every request"
   172→          - "governed_by edge created linking trace to evaluated policy"
   173→        files_to_modify:
   174→          - "app/src/server/proxy/policy-evaluator.ts"
   175→          - "app/src/server/proxy/rate-limiter.ts"
   176→          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
   177→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-policy.test.ts"
   178→        depends_on:
   179→          - "01-02"
   180→          - "01-03"
   181→
   182→      - step_id: "02-02"
   183→        title: "Spend monitoring and dashboard API"
   184→        description: >
   185→          REST API endpoints for spend monitoring dashboard: workspace spend
   186→          overview with budget progress, per-project breakdown (today + MTD +

   195→          - "Spend response includes per-project breakdown with today_spend, mtd_spend, and call_count sorted by today_spend DESC"
   196→          - "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/proxy/sessions returns per-session cost, primary model, call count, and duration sorted by cost DESC"
   197→          - "Anomaly observation created for sessions exceeding 2x average call rate"
   198→          - "Budget threshold alert observation created when daily spend reaches configured percentage"
   199→          - "Unattributed costs visible as separate category in project breakdown"
   200→          - "Spend cache invalidated on every trace creation (inflight tracker callback); TTL (10s) acts as fallback"

   235→    title: "Intelligence — Proxy-Owned Capabilities"
   236→    description: >
   237→      Conversation hash correlation (UUIDv5 content-derived grouping for all
   238→      clients), context injection (workspace decisions/learnings/observations
   239→      injected into system prompt), and trace content capture for Observer analysis.
   240→    steps:
   241→      - step_id: "03-01"
   242→        title: "Conversation hash correlation via UUIDv5"
   243→        description: >
   244→          Per ADR-050: derive deterministic conversation ID from request content
   245→          using UUIDv5(BRAIN_PROXY_NAMESPACE, system_prompt + NUL + first_user_message).
   246→          Conversation hash resolver is a pure function (no DB, no side effects).
   247→          Conversation upserter performs idempotent CREATE conversation:<uuidv5>
   248→          with workspace, title (truncated first user message), and source="proxy".
   249→          UUIDv5 will not collide with UUIDv4 used by web UI. Pipeline position:
   250→          after session resolution, before context injection. Conversation link
   251→          stored in trace input FLEXIBLE field. Failure never blocks forwarding.
   252→        acceptance_criteria:
   253→          - "Identical requests (same system prompt + first user message) produce the same conversation ID across calls"
   254→          - "Different system prompts or different first user messages produce different conversation IDs"
   255→          - "Conversation record created with workspace, title (first user message truncated ~100 chars), source='proxy', createdAt, updatedAt"
   256→          - "Second request with same content reuses existing conversation record — upserter attempts CREATE conversation:<uuidv5>, catches duplicate error, queries existing record via SELECT; returns existing record on conflict"
   257→          - "Trace input FLEXIBLE field contains conversation reference when hash resolved"
   258→          - "Missing system prompt or missing first user message — conversation hash not computed; trace created without conversation field populated"
   259→          - "Conversation upsert failure does not block request forwarding — warning observation logged"
   260→        files_to_modify:
   261→          - "app/src/server/proxy/conversation-hash-resolver.ts"
   262→          - "app/src/server/proxy/conversation-upserter.ts"
   263→          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
   264→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-conversation-hash.test.ts"
   265→        depends_on:
   266→          - "01-02"
   267→          - "01-03"
   268→
   269→      - step_id: "03-02"
   270→        title: "Context injection with intelligence config"
   271→        description: >
   272→          Pre-forward request enrichment with workspace knowledge graph context.
   273→          Intelligence config loader reads proxy_intelligence_config per workspace
   274→          with env-var fallbacks. Context cache (in-memory Map with TTL) stores
   275→          workspace candidate pools (confirmed decisions, active learnings, open
   276→          conflict/warning observations with embeddings). Per-turn ranking: embed
   277→          last user message, compute weighted cosine similarity (decisions 1.0,
   278→          learnings 0.8, observations 0.7), select top N within token budget.
   279→          Inject as <brain-context> XML block appended to system field (normalize
   280→          string|array, preserve existing blocks + cache_control). Fail-open on
   281→          any error. Trace writer extended to capture response content in FLEXIBLE
   282→          output field and intelligence metadata in input field.
   283→        acceptance_criteria:
   284→          - "Workspace decisions, learnings, and observations injected into system prompt as <brain-context> XML block"
   285→          - "Original system prompt content preserved — brain-context appended at end"
   286→          - "Array-form system prompt preserved with brain-context as additional text block with cache_control: ephemeral"
   287→          - "Last user message embedded using existing EMBEDDING_MODEL from config (same model used for entity embeddings)"
   288→          - "Token budget respected — candidates ranked by weighted cosine similarity, top N selected within budget"
   289→          - "Context candidate pool cached in-memory per workspace; populated via: SELECT id, summary, embedding FROM decision WHERE workspace=$ws AND status='confirmed' LIMIT 50; SELECT id, text, embedding FROM learning WHERE workspace=$ws AND status='active' LIMIT 30; SELECT id, text, embedding FROM observation WHERE workspace=$ws AND status='open' AND severity IN ['conflict','warning'] LIMIT 20; refreshed on TTL expiry"
   290→          - "Context injection disabled via config — request forwarded without modification"
   291→          - "Context injection failure — request forwarded without modification (fail-open), warning logged"
   292→          - "Session cache hit — no DB query on repeated request within TTL"
   293→          - "Empty workspace (no decisions/learnings/observations) — no brain-context block appended"
   294→          - "Trace input FLEXIBLE field contains brain_context_injected, brain_context_decisions, brain_context_learnings, brain_context_observations, brain_context_tokens_est"
   295→          - "Trace output FLEXIBLE field stores opaque response content as {content_blocks: Array<{type: 'text', text: string} | {type: 'tool_use', id: string, name: string, input: object}>, stop_reason: string, usage: {input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens?, cache_read_tokens?}} — proxy captures verbatim, performs NO analysis per ADR-051"
   296→        files_to_modify:
   297→          - "app/src/server/proxy/intelligence-config.ts"
   298→          - "app/src/server/proxy/context-cache.ts"
   299→          - "app/src/server/proxy/context-injector.ts"
   300→          - "app/src/server/proxy/trace-writer.ts"
   301→          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
   302→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-context-injection.test.ts"
   303→        depends_on:
   304→          - "01-03"
   305→          - "03-01"
   306→
   307→  - id: "04"
   308→    title: "Intelligence — Observer Extensions"
   309→    description: >
   310→      Per ADR-051: all detection and analysis logic lives in the Observer system,
   311→      triggered by SurrealDB EVENTs. The proxy performs NO analysis. New Observer
   312→      capabilities: per-trace response analysis (contradiction + missing decision
   313→      detection), cross-trace pattern synthesis on session end, and reverse
   314→      coherence scan for implementations without decisions.
   315→    steps:
   316→      - step_id: "04-01"
   317→        title: "Observer per-trace analysis via SurrealDB EVENT"
   318→        description: >
   319→          New Observer capability triggered by trace creation EVENT. Migration
   320→          creates trace_llm_call_created EVENT (ASYNC, RETRY 3) that fires on
   321→          CREATE when type='llm_call', posting to /api/observe/trace/:id.
   322→          Observer route gains 'trace' in SUPPORTED_TABLES. Observer agent
   323→          dispatch gains trace case delegating to new Trace Response Analyzer.
   324→          Analyzer: (1) check stop_reason — skip tool_use, (2) extract text
   325→          blocks + tool inputs from output FLEXIBLE field, (3) Contradiction
   326→          detection: Tier 1 embed response → two-step KNN against confirmed
   327→          decisions (SurrealDB v3.0 workaround) → Tier 2 Haiku verification
   328→          on flagged candidates → create conflict observations, (4) Missing
   329→          decision detection: extract decision signals → embed → KNN against
   330→          existing decisions → no match = unrecorded → Tier 2 verification →
   331→          create info observations. Both pipelines use existing verification
   332→          pipeline for confidence scoring.
   333→        acceptance_criteria:
   334→          - "SurrealDB EVENT trace_llm_call_created fires on trace creation with type='llm_call' (ASYNC, RETRY 3)"
   335→          - "Observer route handles trace entity type — dispatches to trace response analyzer"
   336→          - "Contradiction detected when trace response conflicts with confirmed decision (conflict observation created)"
   337→          - "Missing decision detected when trace contains unrecorded approach choice (info/validation observation created)"
   338→          - "Tool-use stop_reason — trace analysis skipped (intermediate loop step)"
   339→          - "KNN queries use two-step pattern per SurrealDB v3.0 workaround: LET $candidates = SELECT ... WHERE embedding <|20,COSINE|> $vec; SELECT ... FROM $candidates WHERE workspace = $ws ORDER BY similarity DESC"
   340→          - "No contradiction when response aligns with all workspace decisions"
   341→          - "Low-confidence contradiction discarded by Tier 2 verification (confidence < 0.6)"
   342→          - "Multiple contradictions in single trace — separate observations per decision"
   343→          - "Observer analysis failure — trace still exists, no observations created (fail-skip)"
   344→          - "Observations created with sourceAgent='observer_agent', not 'llm_proxy'"
   345→          - "Observer webhook receiver at POST /api/observe/trace/:id dispatches to trace response analyzer"
   346→          - "Webhook handler returns 200 on all analysis errors (embedding, KNN, LLM verification) to prevent EVENT retries; returns 400 only for malformed request body"
   347→        prerequisite: "Verify observer-route.ts exports SUPPORTED_TABLES array with dispatch pattern for at least 'task' and 'decision' types (grep for 'SUPPORTED_TABLES'). Verify POST /api/observe/:table/:id route exists in start-server.ts. Verify SurrealDB supports DEFINE EVENT ... ASYNC syntax (required for v3.0+)."
   348→        files_to_modify:
   349→          - "schema/migrations/0043_trace_llm_call_event.surql"
   350→          - "schema/surreal-schema.surql"
   351→          - "app/src/server/observer/trace-response-analyzer.ts"
   352→          - "app/src/server/observer/observer-route.ts"
   353→          - "app/src/server/agents/observer/agent.ts"
   354→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-observer-trace.test.ts"
   355→        depends_on:
   356→          - "03-02"
   357→
   358→      - step_id: "04-02"
   359→        title: "Observer session-end analysis + reverse coherence scan"
   360→        description: >
   361→          Two new Observer capabilities. (1) Session-end cross-trace pattern
   362→          synthesis: migration creates session_ended EVENT (ASYNC, RETRY 3) that
   363→          fires when agent_session.ended_at transitions from NONE to a value.
   364→          Observer route gains 'agent_session' in SUPPORTED_TABLES. Session Trace
   365→          Analyzer loads all traces for the session, delegates to OBSERVER_MODEL
   366→          for cross-trace pattern analysis (approach drift, accumulated
   367→          contradictions, decision evolution), applies confidence gate + peer
   368→          review pipeline, creates conflict observations for verified patterns.
   369→          (2) Reverse coherence scan: new phase in runCoherenceScans() that
   370→          queries completed tasks and git commits with no linked decision records
   371→          (no implemented_by or belongs_to edges). Deterministic graph query, no
   372→          LLM needed. Creates info observations for implementations without
   373→          decisions. Deduplicates against existing observations.
   374→        acceptance_criteria:
   375→          - "SurrealDB EVENT session_ended fires when agent_session.ended_at transitions from NONE to value (ASYNC, RETRY 3)"
   376→          - "Observer route handles agent_session entity type — dispatches to session trace analyzer"
   377→          - "Approach drift detected when early trace picks approach A but later trace implements approach B"
   378→          - "Consistent traces across session — no cross-trace observations created"
   379→          - "Single trace in session — no cross-trace patterns possible, analysis skipped"
   380→          - "Session-end analysis failure — session still ends normally (ASYNC EVENT, fail-skip)"
   381→          - "Accumulated contradiction across multiple traces creates conflict observation"
   382→          - "Completed tasks (>14 days, status=completed) without decision links flagged as implementation-without-decision — query: tasks WHERE status='completed' AND created_at < time::now() - 14d AND no edges matching <-implemented_by<-decision"
   383→          - "14-day age threshold allows recent implementations to accrue decisions before flagging"
   384→          - "Tasks WITH decision links (direct or via feature->belongs_to->decision) — no observation created"
   385→          - "Recent tasks (under 14-day age threshold) — not flagged"
   386→          - "Deduplicates against existing observations WHERE category='implementation-without-decision' AND observes target matches task within past 30 days"
   387→        files_to_modify:
   388→          - "schema/migrations/0044_session_ended_event.surql"
   389→          - "schema/surreal-schema.surql"
   390→          - "app/src/server/observer/session-trace-analyzer.ts"
   391→          - "app/src/server/observer/graph-scan.ts"
   392→          - "app/src/server/observer/observer-route.ts"
   393→          - "app/src/server/agents/observer/agent.ts"
   394→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-observer-session-end.test.ts"
   395→          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-observer-coherence.test.ts"
   396→        depends_on:
   397→          - "04-01"
   398→
   399→# --- Dependency Graph ---
   400→#
   401→#   01-01 (schema)
   402→#     |
   403→#     v
   404→#   01-02 (identity + session) ----+
   405→#     |                            |
   406→#     v                            v
   407→#   01-03 (trace + cost) -------> 02-01 (policy)
   408→#     |         |                    |
   409→#     v         v                    v
   410→#   03-01    02-02 (spend)        02-03 (audit)
   411→#   (conv)
   412→#     |
   413→#     v
   414→#   03-02 (context injection)
   415→#     |
   416→#     v
   417→#   04-01 (observer trace)
   418→#     |
   419→#     v
   420→#   04-02 (observer session + coherence)
   421→#
   422→# Critical path: 01-01 → 01-02 → 01-03 → 03-01 → 03-02 → 04-01 → 04-02
   423→# Parallel track: 01-03 → 02-01 → 02-03 (policy + audit)
   424→# Parallel track: 01-03 → 02-02 (spend dashboard)
   425→
   426→# --- Metrics ---
   427→#
   428→# Total steps: 10
   429→# Total acceptance criteria: 87 (post-review revision, was 78)
   430→# Avg AC per step: 8.7
   431→# New production files: ~18
   432→# Modified production files: ~8
   433→# Migration files: 4
   434→# Test files: 12 (all pre-existing from distill phase)
   435→# Step/file ratio: 10/22 = 0.45 (well under 2.5)
   436→#
   437→# Scenario → test file mapping:
   438→#   M1  Passthrough (8):       01-02 → llm-proxy-passthrough.test.ts
   439→#   M2  Identity (5):          01-02 → llm-proxy-identity.test.ts
   440→#   M3  Trace (7):             01-03 → llm-proxy-trace.test.ts
   441→#   M4  Cost (7):              01-03 + 02-02 → llm-proxy-cost.test.ts
   442→#   M5  Policy (7):            02-01 → llm-proxy-policy.test.ts
   443→#   M6  Dashboard (5):         02-02 → llm-proxy-dashboard.test.ts
   444→#   M7  Audit (4):             02-03 → llm-proxy-audit.test.ts
   445→#   M8  Context Injection (8): 03-02 → llm-proxy-context-injection.test.ts
   446→#   M9  Conversation Hash (6): 03-01 → llm-proxy-conversation-hash.test.ts
   447→#   M10 Session Resolution (5): 01-02 → llm-proxy-session-resolution.test.ts
   448→#   M11 Observer Trace (7):    04-01 → llm-proxy-observer-trace.test.ts
   449→#   M12 Observer Session (5):  04-02 → llm-proxy-observer-session-end.test.ts
   450→#   M13 Reverse Coherence (5): 04-02 → llm-proxy-observer-coherence.test.ts
   451→#   Total: 82 scenarios across 10 steps, 12 test files
   452→#
   453→# Pre-implementation gate:
   454→#   All 12 test files from distill phase must exist with test structure
   455→#   (setup, assertions, teardown) before Step 01-01 migrations are applied.
   456→#   Test files must use parametrized test cases for input variations
   457→#   (e.g., test.each or describe.each), not duplicate test methods per variation.
   458→

file.content:
# LLM Proxy Intelligence — Implementation Roadmap
#
# Builds on existing walking skeleton (anthropic-proxy-route.ts) which provides
# basic SSE passthrough with metadata parsing. This roadmap adds: full identity
# resolution, trace capture, cost attribution, policy enforcement, spend/audit
# APIs, context injection, conversation correlation, and Observer intelligence.
#
# Design artifacts:
#   - docs/architecture/llm-proxy-architecture.md (base proxy)
#   - docs/architecture/llm-proxy-intelligence-design.md (intelligence capabilities)
#   - docs/feature/llm-proxy/design/ (architecture, components, data models, tech stack)
#   - docs/feature/llm-proxy/distill/ (82 acceptance scenarios across 13 milestones)
#   - docs/adrs/ADR-050 (conversation hash UUIDv5)
#   - docs/adrs/ADR-051 (Observer-owned detection, no proxy response analyzer)
#
# Paradigm: Functional (TypeScript)
# Rigor: inherit model, review enabled, mutation disabled

project_id: llm-proxy
title: "LLM Proxy — Transparent Passthrough with Intelligence Layer"
paradigm: functional

validation:
  status: approved
  reviewed_at: "2026-03-16"
  reviewer: nw-software-crafter-reviewer
  iteration: 2
  verdict: APPROVED
  revision_summary: >
    Revision 2: Addressed all 6 blocking + 5 high issues from iteration 1 crafter review.
    D2: Fixed CREATE idempotency semantics (catch error, not no-op).
    D3: Added webhook error handling contract for Observer EVENT reliability.
    D4: Specified trace output FLEXIBLE field JSON shape.
    D5: Added route registration verification AC for spend/audit endpoints.
    D6: Made Observer prerequisites explicit (file paths, patterns to verify).
    H1: Added parametrized test requirement to pre-implementation gate.
    H2: Specified exact budget enforcement SurrealDB query.
    H3: Added KNN two-step workaround pattern to Observer AC.
    H4: Specified proxy pipeline hook execution order.
    H5: Specified exact SurrealDB queries for context candidate pool.

phases:
  - id: "01"
    title: "Foundation — Schema, Passthrough, Identity, Trace, Cost"
    description: >
      Extend the walking skeleton into a production proxy: schema migrations for
      llm_call trace type, identity resolution from Claude Code metadata + headers,
      async trace capture with graph edges, and cost computation from pricing tables.
    steps:
      - step_id: "01-01"
        title: "Schema migrations for LLM proxy"
        description: >
          Three migrations extending the schema for LLM proxy capabilities:
          (1) Add 'llm_call' to trace type ASSERT, add LLM-specific optional fields
          (model, provider, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens,
          cache_read_tokens, cost_usd, stop_reason, request_id).
          (2) Rename opencode_session_id to external_session_id on agent_session
          with composite index for session lookup.
          (3) Create proxy_intelligence_config SCHEMAFULL table with workspace-scoped
          settings for context injection and contradiction detection.
          Update surreal-schema.surql with all new definitions.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "trace type ASSERT includes 'llm_call' alongside existing types"
          - "LLM fields (model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cost_usd, provider, stop_reason, request_id) defined as option<> on trace"
          - "agent_session.external_session_id replaces opencode_session_id via 3-step data migration: (1) DEFINE FIELD external_session_id, (2) UPDATE agent_session SET external_session_id = opencode_session_id WHERE opencode_session_id IS NOT NONE, (3) REMOVE FIELD opencode_session_id; composite index on (external_session_id, workspace) created after data copy"
          - "proxy_intelligence_config table created in migration 0042 — SCHEMAFULL with workspace, context_injection_enabled, context_injection_token_budget, context_injection_cache_ttl_seconds, context_injection_tier, contradiction_detection_enabled, contradiction_tier1_threshold, contradiction_tier2_confidence_min fields"
          - "surreal-schema.surql updated with all new definitions (reflects state after all three migrations applied)"
          - "bun migrate applies all three migrations successfully"
          - "Schema migrations are breaking (per project policy) — no rollback supported; ensure implementation readiness before applying"
        files_to_modify:
          - "schema/migrations/0040_trace_llm_call_fields.surql"
          - "schema/migrations/0041_proxy_session_id.surql"
          - "schema/migrations/0042_proxy_intelligence_config.surql"
          - "schema/surreal-schema.surql"
        depends_on: []

      - step_id: "01-02"
        title: "Proxy handler refactor with identity + session resolution"
        description: >
          Refactor the walking skeleton anthropic-proxy-route to accept
          ServerDependencies (surreal, inflight tracker, config). Extract identity
          resolution into a pure function that parses metadata.user_id (Claude Code
          format) + X-Brain-Workspace + X-Brain-Task + X-Brain-Agent-Type headers.
          Extract session ID resolution into a pure function that reads session ID
          from metadata.user_id (session_{uuid} pattern) or X-Brain-Session header.
          Add workspace validation (verify workspace exists in DB, cached). Ensure
          full header forwarding (anthropic-version, anthropic-beta, x-api-key,
          authorization, content-type). Upstream failure returns 502 with
          source:proxy distinction. Malformed request body forwarded as-is.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "Proxy handler receives ServerDependencies for SurrealDB and inflight access"
          - "Identity resolved from metadata.user_id + X-Brain-Workspace + X-Brain-Task + X-Brain-Agent-Type"
          - "Session ID extracted from metadata.user_id session_{uuid} pattern OR X-Brain-Session header"
          - "Missing identity signals degrade gracefully (workspace-only or no attribution)"
          - "Invalid workspace logged as warning but does not block request forwarding"
          - "Upstream failure returns 502 with {error: 'upstream_unreachable', source: 'proxy'}"
          - "Malformed/non-JSON request body forwarded without proxy validation errors"
          - "All required headers forwarded: anthropic-version, anthropic-beta, x-api-key, authorization, content-type"
          - "count_tokens requests forwarded without triggering trace capture"
          - "Proxy pipeline execution order: (1) identity resolution, (2) session ID resolution, (3) conversation hash [03-01], (4) policy evaluation [02-01], (5) context injection [03-02], (6) request forwarding, (7) async trace capture [01-03]"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/identity-resolver.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/session-id-resolver.ts"
          - "app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-passthrough.test.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-identity.test.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-session-resolution.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "01-01"

      - step_id: "01-03"
        title: "Async trace capture with cost computation"
        description: >
          Trace writer module that creates llm_call trace nodes in SurrealDB after
          stream/response completion. Async via deps.inflight.track(). Creates
          RELATE edges: session->invoked->trace, trace->scoped_to->workspace,
          trace->attributed_to->task (when task resolved). Cost calculator computes
          per-call cost from a static pricing table (TypeScript config object) using
          model-specific rates for input, output, cache_creation, and cache_read
          tokens. SSE usage extraction extended to capture cache_creation_tokens and
          cache_read_tokens from message_start events. Non-streaming usage extracted
          from response body. Graph write failure retried 3x with exponential
          backoff, fallback to structured log output.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "llm_call trace node created for every forwarded LLM call with model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cost_usd, latency_ms, stop_reason"
          - "RELATE edges created: session->invoked->trace (when session resolved), trace->scoped_to->workspace (always), trace->attributed_to->task (when task resolved)"
          - "Cost computed from model-specific pricing: (uncached_input * input_rate + cache_read * cache_rate + output * output_rate) / 1_000_000"
          - "Trace capture does not block response delivery — all work via deps.inflight.track()"
          - "Graph write failure retried 3x with exponential backoff, then logged as structured output"
          - "Non-streaming responses extract usage from JSON response body"
          - "Cache tokens (cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens) captured from SSE message_start event"
          - "count_tokens requests do NOT create traces"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/trace-writer.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/cost-calculator.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/pricing-table.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-trace.test.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-cost.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "01-01"
          - "01-02"

  - id: "02"
    title: "Value — Policy Enforcement, Spend API, Audit"
    description: >
      Pre-request policy enforcement (model access, budget, rate limiting),
      spend monitoring API endpoints for dashboard consumption, and audit
      provenance chain with compliance verification.
    steps:
      - step_id: "02-01"
        title: "Policy enforcement at proxy boundary"
        description: >
          Pre-request policy evaluation using the existing evaluatePolicyGate()
          pipeline with llm_call context. Model access checks use policy rules
          matching agent_type to allowed_models. Budget enforcement reads today's
          spend from trace aggregation, compares against workspace daily_budget.
          Rate limiting uses in-memory sliding window counter per workspace
          (too frequent for DB queries). Policy violation responses include
          policy reference and remediation guidance. No policies configured
          defaults to permissive with warning observation. Policy decisions
          logged for audit trail.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "Model access violation returns 403 with JSON body: {error, policy_ref, policy_description, model_suggestion, remediation}"
          - "Budget exceeded returns 429 with JSON body: {error, current_spend_usd, daily_limit_usd, time_until_reset_seconds}; spend computed via SELECT math::sum(cost_usd) FROM trace WHERE ->scoped_to->workspace = $ws AND created_at >= time::floor(time::now(), 1d)"
          - "Rate limit exceeded returns 429 with Retry-After header + JSON body: {error, rate_limit_per_minute, reset_time_unix}"
          - "Budget enforcement reads today's spend from cached spend aggregation (updated on every trace write, TTL 10s fallback); cache miss triggers live trace aggregation query"
          - "Policy check completes under 10ms at p99 (in-memory rate limit + cached spend)"
          - "No policies configured defaults to permissive — request forwarded with warning observation"
          - "Policy decision (pass/fail, policy_ref, timestamp) logged on every request"
          - "governed_by edge created linking trace to evaluated policy"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/policy-evaluator.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/rate-limiter.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-policy.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "01-02"
          - "01-03"

      - step_id: "02-02"
        title: "Spend monitoring and dashboard API"
        description: >
          REST API endpoints for spend monitoring dashboard: workspace spend
          overview with budget progress, per-project breakdown (today + MTD +
          call count), per-session cost breakdown (cost, primary model, duration).
          Anomaly detection creates observations for sessions exceeding 2x average
          call rate. Budget threshold alerts fire at workspace-configured percentage
          (default 80%). Spend aggregation cached with short TTL (10s) for
          dashboard reads. Cache invalidated on every trace creation via
          inflight tracker callback; TTL acts as fallback invalidation.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/proxy/spend returns workspace total spend, budget progress percentage, and daily limit"
          - "Spend response includes per-project breakdown with today_spend, mtd_spend, and call_count sorted by today_spend DESC"
          - "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/proxy/sessions returns per-session cost, primary model, call count, and duration sorted by cost DESC"
          - "Anomaly observation created for sessions exceeding 2x average call rate"
          - "Budget threshold alert observation created when daily spend reaches configured percentage"
          - "Unattributed costs visible as separate category in project breakdown"
          - "Spend cache invalidated on every trace creation (inflight tracker callback); TTL (10s) acts as fallback"
          - "All spend queries respond within 2 seconds"
          - "Spend and session endpoints registered in start-server.ts route handler — verified by acceptance test HTTP calls returning 200"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/spend-api.ts"
          - "app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-cost.test.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-dashboard.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "01-03"

      - step_id: "02-03"
        title: "Audit provenance chain and compliance"
        description: >
          REST API endpoints for audit trail: trace detail with full provenance
          chain (linked session, workspace, task, policy), date-range queries by
          project, authorization compliance check verifying policy edges on all
          traces in period, and JSON export. Traces without governed_by policy
          edge flagged as "unverified" in compliance report.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/proxy/traces/:traceId returns usage data plus linked session, workspace, task, and policy entities"
          - "Provenance chain exportable as structured JSON"
          - "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/proxy/traces?project=X&start=Y&end=Z returns results within 2 seconds"
          - "GET /api/workspaces/:wsId/proxy/compliance?start=X&end=Y verifies governed_by edges on all traces"
          - "Traces without policy authorization flagged as 'unverified' with time period and reason"
          - "Compliance summary returns {period: {start, end}, authorized_count: N, unverified_count: M, unverified_traces: Array<{id, model, created_at}>}"
          - "Audit endpoints (traces, compliance) registered in start-server.ts route handler — verified by acceptance test HTTP calls returning 200"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/audit-api.ts"
          - "app/src/server/runtime/start-server.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-audit.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "02-01"

  - id: "03"
    title: "Intelligence — Proxy-Owned Capabilities"
    description: >
      Conversation hash correlation (UUIDv5 content-derived grouping for all
      clients), context injection (workspace decisions/learnings/observations
      injected into system prompt), and trace content capture for Observer analysis.
    steps:
      - step_id: "03-01"
        title: "Conversation hash correlation via UUIDv5"
        description: >
          Per ADR-050: derive deterministic conversation ID from request content
          using UUIDv5(BRAIN_PROXY_NAMESPACE, system_prompt + NUL + first_user_message).
          Conversation hash resolver is a pure function (no DB, no side effects).
          Conversation upserter performs idempotent CREATE conversation:<uuidv5>
          with workspace, title (truncated first user message), and source="proxy".
          UUIDv5 will not collide with UUIDv4 used by web UI. Pipeline position:
          after session resolution, before context injection. Conversation link
          stored in trace input FLEXIBLE field. Failure never blocks forwarding.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "Identical requests (same system prompt + first user message) produce the same conversation ID across calls"
          - "Different system prompts or different first user messages produce different conversation IDs"
          - "Conversation record created with workspace, title (first user message truncated ~100 chars), source='proxy', createdAt, updatedAt"
          - "Second request with same content reuses existing conversation record — upserter attempts CREATE conversation:<uuidv5>, catches duplicate error, queries existing record via SELECT; returns existing record on conflict"
          - "Trace input FLEXIBLE field contains conversation reference when hash resolved"
          - "Missing system prompt or missing first user message — conversation hash not computed; trace created without conversation field populated"
          - "Conversation upsert failure does not block request forwarding — warning observation logged"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/conversation-hash-resolver.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/conversation-upserter.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-conversation-hash.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "01-02"
          - "01-03"

      - step_id: "03-02"
        title: "Context injection with intelligence config"
        description: >
          Pre-forward request enrichment with workspace knowledge graph context.
          Intelligence config loader reads proxy_intelligence_config per workspace
          with env-var fallbacks. Context cache (in-memory Map with TTL) stores
          workspace candidate pools (confirmed decisions, active learnings, open
          conflict/warning observations with embeddings). Per-turn ranking: embed
          last user message, compute weighted cosine similarity (decisions 1.0,
          learnings 0.8, observations 0.7), select top N within token budget.
          Inject as <brain-context> XML block appended to system field (normalize
          string|array, preserve existing blocks + cache_control). Fail-open on
          any error. Trace writer extended to capture response content in FLEXIBLE
          output field and intelligence metadata in input field.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "Workspace decisions, learnings, and observations injected into system prompt as <brain-context> XML block"
          - "Original system prompt content preserved — brain-context appended at end"
          - "Array-form system prompt preserved with brain-context as additional text block with cache_control: ephemeral"
          - "Last user message embedded using existing EMBEDDING_MODEL from config (same model used for entity embeddings)"
          - "Token budget respected — candidates ranked by weighted cosine similarity, top N selected within budget"
          - "Context candidate pool cached in-memory per workspace; populated via: SELECT id, summary, embedding FROM decision WHERE workspace=$ws AND status='confirmed' LIMIT 50; SELECT id, text, embedding FROM learning WHERE workspace=$ws AND status='active' LIMIT 30; SELECT id, text, embedding FROM observation WHERE workspace=$ws AND status='open' AND severity IN ['conflict','warning'] LIMIT 20; refreshed on TTL expiry"
          - "Context injection disabled via config — request forwarded without modification"
          - "Context injection failure — request forwarded without modification (fail-open), warning logged"
          - "Session cache hit — no DB query on repeated request within TTL"
          - "Empty workspace (no decisions/learnings/observations) — no brain-context block appended"
          - "Trace input FLEXIBLE field contains brain_context_injected, brain_context_decisions, brain_context_learnings, brain_context_observations, brain_context_tokens_est"
          - "Trace output FLEXIBLE field stores opaque response content as {content_blocks: Array<{type: 'text', text: string} | {type: 'tool_use', id: string, name: string, input: object}>, stop_reason: string, usage: {input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_tokens?, cache_read_tokens?}} — proxy captures verbatim, performs NO analysis per ADR-051"
        files_to_modify:
          - "app/src/server/proxy/intelligence-config.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/context-cache.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/context-injector.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/trace-writer.ts"
          - "app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-context-injection.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "01-03"
          - "03-01"

  - id: "04"
    title: "Intelligence — Observer Extensions"
    description: >
      Per ADR-051: all detection and analysis logic lives in the Observer system,
      triggered by SurrealDB EVENTs. The proxy performs NO analysis. New Observer
      capabilities: per-trace response analysis (contradiction + missing decision
      detection), cross-trace pattern synthesis on session end, and reverse
      coherence scan for implementations without decisions.
    steps:
      - step_id: "04-01"
        title: "Observer per-trace analysis via SurrealDB EVENT"
        description: >
          New Observer capability triggered by trace creation EVENT. Migration
          creates trace_llm_call_created EVENT (ASYNC, RETRY 3) that fires on
          CREATE when type='llm_call', posting to /api/observe/trace/:id.
          Observer route gains 'trace' in SUPPORTED_TABLES. Observer agent
          dispatch gains trace case delegating to new Trace Response Analyzer.
          Analyzer: (1) check stop_reason — skip tool_use, (2) extract text
          blocks + tool inputs from output FLEXIBLE field, (3) Contradiction
          detection: Tier 1 embed response → two-step KNN against confirmed
          decisions (SurrealDB v3.0 workaround) → Tier 2 Haiku verification
          on flagged candidates → create conflict observations, (4) Missing
          decision detection: extract decision signals → embed → KNN against
          existing decisions → no match = unrecorded → Tier 2 verification →
          create info observations. Both pipelines use existing verification
          pipeline for confidence scoring.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "SurrealDB EVENT trace_llm_call_created fires on trace creation with type='llm_call' (ASYNC, RETRY 3)"
          - "Observer route handles trace entity type — dispatches to trace response analyzer"
          - "Contradiction detected when trace response conflicts with confirmed decision (conflict observation created)"
          - "Missing decision detected when trace contains unrecorded approach choice (info/validation observation created)"
          - "Tool-use stop_reason — trace analysis skipped (intermediate loop step)"
          - "KNN queries use two-step pattern per SurrealDB v3.0 workaround: LET $candidates = SELECT ... WHERE embedding <|20,COSINE|> $vec; SELECT ... FROM $candidates WHERE workspace = $ws ORDER BY similarity DESC"
          - "No contradiction when response aligns with all workspace decisions"
          - "Low-confidence contradiction discarded by Tier 2 verification (confidence < 0.6)"
          - "Multiple contradictions in single trace — separate observations per decision"
          - "Observer analysis failure — trace still exists, no observations created (fail-skip)"
          - "Observations created with sourceAgent='observer_agent', not 'llm_proxy'"
          - "Observer webhook receiver at POST /api/observe/trace/:id dispatches to trace response analyzer"
          - "Webhook handler returns 200 on all analysis errors (embedding, KNN, LLM verification) to prevent EVENT retries; returns 400 only for malformed request body"
        prerequisite: "Verify observer-route.ts exports SUPPORTED_TABLES array with dispatch pattern for at least 'task' and 'decision' types (grep for 'SUPPORTED_TABLES'). Verify POST /api/observe/:table/:id route exists in start-server.ts. Verify SurrealDB supports DEFINE EVENT ... ASYNC syntax (required for v3.0+)."
        files_to_modify:
          - "schema/migrations/0043_trace_llm_call_event.surql"
          - "schema/surreal-schema.surql"
          - "app/src/server/observer/trace-response-analyzer.ts"
          - "app/src/server/observer/observer-route.ts"
          - "app/src/server/agents/observer/agent.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-observer-trace.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "03-02"

      - step_id: "04-02"
        title: "Observer session-end analysis + reverse coherence scan"
        description: >
          Two new Observer capabilities. (1) Session-end cross-trace pattern
          synthesis: migration creates session_ended EVENT (ASYNC, RETRY 3) that
          fires when agent_session.ended_at transitions from NONE to a value.
          Observer route gains 'agent_session' in SUPPORTED_TABLES. Session Trace
          Analyzer loads all traces for the session, delegates to OBSERVER_MODEL
          for cross-trace pattern analysis (approach drift, accumulated
          contradictions, decision evolution), applies confidence gate + peer
          review pipeline, creates conflict observations for verified patterns.
          (2) Reverse coherence scan: new phase in runCoherenceScans() that
          queries completed tasks and git commits with no linked decision records
          (no implemented_by or belongs_to edges). Deterministic graph query, no
          LLM needed. Creates info observations for implementations without
          decisions. Deduplicates against existing observations.
        acceptance_criteria:
          - "SurrealDB EVENT session_ended fires when agent_session.ended_at transitions from NONE to value (ASYNC, RETRY 3)"
          - "Observer route handles agent_session entity type — dispatches to session trace analyzer"
          - "Approach drift detected when early trace picks approach A but later trace implements approach B"
          - "Consistent traces across session — no cross-trace observations created"
          - "Single trace in session — no cross-trace patterns possible, analysis skipped"
          - "Session-end analysis failure — session still ends normally (ASYNC EVENT, fail-skip)"
          - "Accumulated contradiction across multiple traces creates conflict observation"
          - "Completed tasks (>14 days, status=completed) without decision links flagged as implementation-without-decision — query: tasks WHERE status='completed' AND created_at < time::now() - 14d AND no edges matching <-implemented_by<-decision"
          - "14-day age threshold allows recent implementations to accrue decisions before flagging"
          - "Tasks WITH decision links (direct or via feature->belongs_to->decision) — no observation created"
          - "Recent tasks (under 14-day age threshold) — not flagged"
          - "Deduplicates against existing observations WHERE category='implementation-without-decision' AND observes target matches task within past 30 days"
        files_to_modify:
          - "schema/migrations/0044_session_ended_event.surql"
          - "schema/surreal-schema.surql"
          - "app/src/server/observer/session-trace-analyzer.ts"
          - "app/src/server/observer/graph-scan.ts"
          - "app/src/server/observer/observer-route.ts"
          - "app/src/server/agents/observer/agent.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-observer-session-end.test.ts"
          - "tests/acceptance/llm-proxy/llm-proxy-observer-coherence.test.ts"
        depends_on:
          - "04-01"

# --- Dependency Graph ---
#
#   01-01 (schema)
#     |
#     v
#   01-02 (identity + session) ----+
#     |                            |
#     v                            v
#   01-03 (trace + cost) -------> 02-01 (policy)
#     |         |                    |
#     v         v                    v
#   03-01    02-02 (spend)        02-03 (audit)
#   (conv)
#     |
#     v
#   03-02 (context injection)
#     |
#     v
#   04-01 (observer trace)
#     |
#     v
#   04-02 (observer session + coherence)
#
# Critical path: 01-01 → 01-02 → 01-03 → 03-01 → 03-02 → 04-01 → 04-02
# Parallel track: 01-03 → 02-01 → 02-03 (policy + audit)
# Parallel track: 01-03 → 02-02 (spend dashboard)

# --- Metrics ---
#
# Total steps: 10
# Total acceptance criteria: 87 (post-review revision, was 78)
# Avg AC per step: 8.7
# New production files: ~18
# Modified production files: ~8
# Migration files: 4
# Test files: 12 (all pre-existing from distill phase)
# Step/file ratio: 10/22 = 0.45 (well under 2.5)
#
# Scenario → test file mapping:
#   M1  Passthrough (8):       01-02 → llm-proxy-passthrough.test.ts
#   M2  Identity (5):          01-02 → llm-proxy-identity.test.ts
#   M3  Trace (7):             01-03 → llm-proxy-trace.test.ts
#   M4  Cost (7):              01-03 + 02-02 → llm-proxy-cost.test.ts
#   M5  Policy (7):            02-01 → llm-proxy-policy.test.ts
#   M6  Dashboard (5):         02-02 → llm-proxy-dashboard.test.ts
#   M7  Audit (4):             02-03 → llm-proxy-audit.test.ts
#   M8  Context Injection (8): 03-02 → llm-proxy-context-injection.test.ts
#   M9  Conversation Hash (6): 03-01 → llm-proxy-conversation-hash.test.ts
#   M10 Session Resolution (5): 01-02 → llm-proxy-session-resolution.test.ts
#   M11 Observer Trace (7):    04-01 → llm-proxy-observer-trace.test.ts
#   M12 Observer Session (5):  04-02 → llm-proxy-observer-session-end.test.ts
#   M13 Reverse Coherence (5): 04-02 → llm-proxy-observer-coherence.test.ts
#   Total: 82 scenarios across 10 steps, 12 test files
#
# Pre-implementation gate:
#   All 12 test files from distill phase must exist with test structure
#   (setup, assertions, teardown) before Step 01-01 migrations are applied.
#   Test files must use parametrized test cases for input variations
#   (e.g., test.each or describe.each), not duplicate test methods per variation.
